description: Sync Admin By Request audit, event, inventory, and elevation-request data for approvals, quota checks, and admin-risk reports.

novel_features.name: Repeat-Requestor Detection
novel_features.description: Surface the top users by elevation-request count over a configurable window, so admins can spot patterns the portal does not visualize.

novel_features.name: Audit-to-Event Correlation
novel_features.description: Given an audit log entry ID, join it to nearby events on the same computer to reconstruct a full elevation timeline.

novel_features.name: Agent-Version Drift
novel_features.description: List endpoints whose AbR client version is older than a target version, useful for upgrade campaigns.

novel_features.name: Quota Usage Forecast
novel_features.description: Track local API call count against the 100k-per-day quota and predict whether the current pace will exceed it before midnight.

novel_features.name: Denied-Reason Distribution
novel_features.description: Tokenize the free-text deniedReason field across all denied requests and emit a top-N word distribution.

novel_features.name: Compliance Report
novel_features.description: Render audit entries for a user or computer over a window in a format suitable for auditors (CSV or markdown).

novel_features.name: Endpoint Risk Score
novel_features.description: Score each endpoint by elevation frequency, local-admin count, and AbR client version recency.
